text.zh: Transformer 提出了一种完全基于注意力机制、去除循环和卷积的序列建模架构。
text.en: The Transformer proposed a sequence modeling architecture based solely on attention mechanisms, dispensing with recurrence and convolutions.

text.zh: Transformer 架构成为 BERT、GPT 式语言模型和许多现代基础模型的重要基础。
text.en: The Transformer architecture became a key foundation for BERT, GPT-style language models, and many modern foundation models.
